_doc: ECC-inspired verification-loop config. Read by `.claude/hooks/verification_loop.py` (PostToolUse). After every Edit/Write/MultiEdit on a file matching `addon_globs`, the hook nudges the agent to run MCP probes (`python_syntax_check`, `python_import_check`, `xml_validate`, `odoo_manifest_validate`) BEFORE claiming the change is done. Disable: set `enabled: false`. Customize `addon_globs` per project if your tree layout differs.
_doc_default_enabled: Defaults to `enabled: true` — installer policy: enforcement value > onboarding noise. If first-install floods nudges on a dirty project, run `/verification-loop off` (toggle command, future) or edit this file directly. Per-file dedupe (NUDGE_TTL_SECONDS=30) prevents same-file spam but multi-file Edit bursts WILL nudge per file — intentional.

_upstream.author: @affaan-m
_upstream.note: Adapted from generic build/lint/typecheck loop to Odoo 12 MCP probes.
